notes: DVIR roadside proof. Today's DVIR card now lives at the top of the DVIR tab showing the most recent inspection (Pre or Post, driver, truck, time, All Clear or N defects). Big blue button below: 'Show DVIR for DOT Officer' - tap to open a fullscreen, officer-ready proof view with company info, USDOT, full checklist, defect notes, and a green VEHICLE CERTIFIED SAFE TO OPERATE stamp. Email button lets you send the proof to an officer's email on the spot. Compliant with electronic DVIR rule 49 CFR 396.11(c).
